name: SSG 08 | 玛雅之梦
descriptionEn: The SSG08 bolt-action is a low-damage but very cost-effective sniper rifle, making it a smart choice for early-round long-range marksmanship. This memento from Ruins has been painted using a Mayan cloud motif hydrographic. Sometimes a sacrifice is called for
descriptionZh: SSG08 是一把低杀伤力但性价比较高的闩动狙击步枪，是早期回合长距离射击的明智选择。 这把来自玛雅遗址的纪念武器使用玛雅云彩图案的花纹进行了涂装。 有时候，牺牲是必要的
